entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed
entry.content: Thanks to everyone who participated in Devtoberfest 2024. I’m looking forward to meeting the winners at SAP TechEd!

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Tutorial: Machine Learning with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @AdrianDBorja . Regarding issue 1: are using HANA Cloud db in the Free Tier or BTP Trial, which have some restrictions: https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud/sap-hana-cloud-administration-guide/sap-hana-database-license#free-tier-restrictions?

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Request for SAP Code Jam Event in Lucerne
entry.content: Hi @MarcoSchmid . I will be working with you on delivering this SAP CodeJam. I will contact you via an email.

entry.title: 🇵🇱 Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model and SAP generative AI
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event focuses on building AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP AI Core, and SAP Generative AI Hub.

During the event, you will learn about the fundamentals of the genAI, SAP AI Core, and SAP AI Launchpad. You will also learn how to use the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model to expose AI capabilities through your own OData service. While working through the exercises, you will become comfortable creating CDS-based service definitions and integrating them with the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and SAP AI Core Foundation Models.

This is an in-person event (not virtual) scheduled for Thursday, April 3rd, 2025, in Kraków, Poland 🇵🇱 from 10:00 to 16:00. The workshop will be held at the EPAM office and conducted in English.

Prerequisites: Bring your own laptop with a Chromium-based web browser, such as Chrome, Edge, or Vivaldi. Basic knowledge of JavaScript is beneficial, as you will be using the SAP Cloud SDK for AI with the JavaScript variant.

Please note that seating is limited to 25 attendees. Register for this Community Event using the RSVP functionality on this page.

The instructor will be Developer Advocate @Vitaliy-R.

For more information about SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with fellow attendees, visit the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: Invoke Generative AI Hub Models using @sap-ai-sdk/ai-api library in BAS
entry.content:
I am not proficient with JavaScript. I looked into https://github.com/SAP/ai-sdk-js/blob/1f7b857b49da02604f6b9b2539956de881c6c5cf/sample-code/src/ai-api/scenario-api.ts#L27 to see if that's the API you are looking for: https://api.sap.com/api/AI_CORE_API/path/scenario.query_models?

Regards,
--Vitaliy

entry.title: SAP CodeJam HANA ML in India 2025-03 Recap
entry.content:
At the beginning of March 2025, as part of the ML/AI Tour my fellow dev advocate @noravonthenen and I did in India, we held five SAP CodeJam events in Kolkata, Pune, and Bengaluru.

Two of these events focused on getting started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python.

Equally important were chances to catch up with some organizers and participants in informal post-work settings...

...or with our SAP colleagues.

I am glad Nora and I could help so many participants to go through the journey of improving their skills working with ML and AI!

Traditionally, I very much enjoyed SAP Stammtisch at the end of the last CodeJam of the Tour.

#IamSAP 

I always take the opportunity to experience at least a little bit of the city I am in, so you can see my photos:

  • Kolkata: https://www.instagram.com/p/DG1wL0OydCp/ 
  • Pune: https://www.instagram.com/p/DG75rf0MPkt/ 

Now, the next stop for me is in Kraków on April 3rd.

Would you like to host such an SAP CodeJam? Here are the details: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-getting-started-with-machine-learning-usin...

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Trial Account error
entry.content:
It sounds like you have a basic trial.

I would recommend writing to sapbasictrial@sap.com and describing the issues in the email.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: My Most Geeky Hobby - I want to save the planet with Sustainable Solutions
entry.content: Thank you for doing that 🫶🏼

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Tutorial: Creating an FAQ assistant as tool for a BTP AI agent
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing!

I am also working on some exercises with FAQ embedding, search, and HANA-native chunking: https://github.com/Sygyzmundovych/hana-ai-ve-kg-codejam/tree/main/scripts/01-faq-search.  However, it is still a work in progress.

entry.title: Re: A First Look at SAP HANA Cloud, AI-Assisted Database Administration
entry.content: Thanks! It just helped me to solve in 5 minutes one recurring issue that was annoying me for 5 months 🤓

entry.title: Re: Invoke Generative AI Hub Models using @sap-ai-sdk/ai-...
entry.content:
I would need to check how it is done in JavaScript SDK, because in Python SDK it is enough to set the environment variables or a config file `~/.aicore/config.json` as per https://help.sap.com/doc/generative-ai-hub-sdk/CLOUD/en-US/_reference/README_sphynx.html#configuration.

Then the code automatically initiates a client with credentials from those configurations, without an explicit read from env variables or from that config file in your code.

But that's how it is done in Python, and I would need to check how it is done in JS.

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers: Word Search Challenge
entry.content:
JOULECOPILOT

I recently used with SAP HANA Cloud database to find an answer in 5 minutes to the question I had at the back of my mind for the last 5 months 🤓

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Joule Capabilities in SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Apps
entry.content: @yogananda the link you shared cannot be opened by others, because it has `editpage` in the URL. FYI.

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Tutorial: Creating a custom AI agent on the BTP
entry.content: @Cocquerel, could you elaborate a bit on what parts you would like to do via JS and what via Python?

entry.title: Re: Generic Delta Extraction using Function Module not working in Replication Flow
entry.content: Hi Alex. Could you please fix the formatting of your post with the question? It is difficult to read and understand. Thank you. --VR

entry.title: Re: HANA ODBC Test Connection Error
entry.content:
If you say that your client (your laptop) can successfully communicate with the SAP HANA db server on the required SQL port, can you check the versions of HANA db server and HANA Client (ODBC) you are using for compatibility?

If it is SAP HANA Platform, then you might want to check https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/37d2573cb24e4d75a23e8577fb4f73b7.html

On the client side, you might want to do ODBC tracing: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_CLIENT/f1b440ded6144a54ada97ff95dac7adf/35368f78f6884b019caee12c125b255a.html

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Questions about SAP Joule
entry.content:
While I cannot personally answer your questions, I would suggest going to https://support.sap.com/en/product/onboarding-resource-center/sales-service-v2.html and then "Get Enabled" and then "AI Guide" -> Learn more: https://d.dam.sap.com/a/YhsxTAx/SSV2_AI_Guide.pdf?inline=true&rc=10&doi=SAP1068340 where you will find information about the Early Adopter Care program for customers: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3828.

Best regards,
--Vitaliy

entry.title: 🇵🇱 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content:
***REGISTRATION IS NOW CLOSED. IF YOU SIGN UP NOW YOU WILL BE ADDED TO THE WAITING LIST***

This SAP CodeJam event is on Getting Started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need any background in the topic, but you should have a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam, you will learn how to use the Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). This approach improves the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduces hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core, and how to query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Additionally, you will gain insights into key generative AI concepts and learn how to enhance RAG responses.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, May 16th in Wrocław, Poland 🇵🇱 from 10:00 to 16:00 CEST. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor is Developer Advocate @Vitaliy-R from SAP.

The event is kindly hosted by Capgemini. Thank you!

Legnicka 48H, 54-202 Wroclaw, Poland
Floor 5, Room 5.06 DONE

Please note that spaces are limited; we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here at the event page using the "Will you be attending?" functionality.

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Vivaldi, Brave, Microsoft Edge, Google Chrome etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: Re: Documentation of the XML structure of the Calculation view
entry.content: Only the no-code UI-based definition of HANA calc views is available externally. If you want to itegrate it with your solution, then you would need to contact pls@sap.com (SAP Partner Innovation Lifecycle Services). Regards.

entry.title: Re: Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 23.04.2025
entry.content:
Niestety, nie uda mi się tym razem do was dołączyć. Będę w tym samym czasie na wewnętrznym "stammtischu" w Krakowie przed CodeJam'em.

Miłego!
